title: Operations Consulting
short: Streamline your workflows, reduce waste, and improve performance with tailored process optimization strategies.
meta: Operations consulting for BC manufacturers and SMBs: workflow optimization, lean improvement, inventory, KPIs, and measurable productivity gains.
intro: We help growing Canadian teams run leaner without adding headcount. From shop floor to back office, we map how work actually flows and remove friction that slows you down.
bullets: Process mapping, bottleneck analysis, and value-stream review
Inventory systems, SOPs, and standardized procedures
closing: Representative results include major productivity lifts, shorter order cycles, and stronger throughput from practical process redesign.

title: Project & Site Management
short: From relocations to infrastructure upgrades, we plan and manage capital projects with precision and accountability.
meta: Project and site management for facility relocations, capital projects, commissioning, contractor coordination, and on-time delivery across BC.
intro: Capital projects rarely fail on ideas. They fail on coordination. We provide hands-on project and site leadership so complex work stays on schedule.
bullets: Facility relocation and operational launch planning
Capital project budgeting and cost control
closing: Experience includes full manufacturing facility relocations and construction projects with one clear point of accountability.

title: Web Development & Maintenance
short: Build a clean, responsive, and high-performing web presence with ongoing support to keep your site secure, updated, and optimized.
meta: Professional website development, GitHub Pages hosting, Webflow migration, maintenance, forms, DNS, and website support for businesses in British Columbia.
intro: Clean, responsive websites that are easy to maintain, cost-effective to host, and owned directly by your organization.
closing: We assess what the website actually needs and recommend a solution that balances appearance, reliability, cost, and maintainability.

title: IT Systems Administration
short: Keep your infrastructure running smoothly with expert server management, user support, backup systems, and cybersecurity best practices.
meta: IT systems administration, Microsoft 365, Exchange, Intune, Active Directory, server, endpoint, and manufacturing technology support.
intro: Practical IT administration for organizations that depend on reliable infrastructure, cloud services, and connected workplace technology.
closing: Experience spans office, manufacturing, warehouse, production, finance, engineering, and executive environments.

title: Business Intelligence
short: Unlock the power of your data with custom KPI dashboards, reporting tools, and performance tracking solutions.
meta: Power BI dashboards, Power Query, DAX, Excel automation, KPI development, manufacturing analytics, inventory reporting, and executive business intelligence.
intro: Practical business intelligence that helps organizations understand performance, identify risks, and make better operational decisions.
bullets: Power BI, Power Query, and DAX
closing: We validate source data and build reporting leadership can trust—not just charts connected to unverified totals.

title: Automation & Integration
short: Boost efficiency through smart systems: digital inventory, production automation, and process control technologies.
meta: Power Query, VBA, PowerShell, Microsoft 365, data transformation, reporting automation, website forms, and business systems integration.
intro: Practical automation and integration for recurring processes that consume time, create errors, or depend too heavily on manual work.
bullets: Power Query and Excel VBA automation
ERP, PLM, and systems integration support
closing: We recommend an appropriate level of automation that the organization can support over time.

title: Government Funding Applications
short: Secure growth capital with expert support on grant strategy, funding applications, and government incentive programs.
meta: Government funding and grant application support for Canadian SMBs: strategy, submissions, budgets, and post-award reporting with a multimillion-dollar track record.
intro: Canadian programs can fund real growth. We help organizations identify the right programs, build a clear case, and submit work that stands up to review.
closing: Track record includes $4.5M+ secured for infrastructure and equipment, plus broader multimillion-dollar funding support.
